use_cases: Interactive button element with multiple visual variants for forms and calls-to-action
Primary and secondary action triggers in web applications
Icon buttons for toolbars and compact UI areas
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Features standard accessibility focus rings and disabled states. Clean, utility-first design suitable as a foundational UI building block for any SaaS, fintech, or web application.
